sections.paragraph:
& תַּחְבֻּלֹות (from the root חָבַל No. 1, and more immediately derived from the nouns חֶבֶל a rope, חֹבֵל a sailor, a pilot) plur. fem.-

(1) rule, government, Job 37:12 especially that of a state, Pro 11:14.

(2) the art of governing, hence prudent counsel, in a good sense, Pro 1:5 20:18 24:6 cunning counsel, in a bad sense, 12:5 .
